metrics.name: instant_booking_fraction_of_max_value
metrics.description:
Average instant booking value as a ratio of overall max booking value.
Tests constrained ratio measure and predicate pushdown with different filters
on the same measure input.

file_slice.content:
name: instant_booking_fraction_of_max_value
description: |
  Average instant booking value as a ratio of overall max booking value.
  Tests constrained ratio measure and predicate pushdown with different filters
  on the same measure input.
type: ratio
type_params:
  numerator:
    name: average_booking_value
    filter: "{{ Dimension('booking__is_instant') }}"
  denominator:
    name: max_booking_value

metrics.name: lux_booking_fraction_of_max_value
metrics.description:
Average lux booking value as a ratio of overall max booking value.
Tests constrained ratio measure with external dimension join.

file_slice.content:
name: lux_booking_fraction_of_max_value
description: |
  Average lux booking value as a ratio of overall max booking value.
  Tests constrained ratio measure with external dimension join.
type: ratio
type_params:
  numerator:
    name: average_booking_value
    filter: "{{ Dimension('listing__is_lux_latest') }}"
  denominator:
    name: max_booking_value

metrics.name: lux_booking_value_rate_expr
metrics.description:
Lux booking value defined as an expr with lux booking value, lux bookings, and total value as inputs.
Tests constrained measure expr metric with external dimension join.

file_slice.content:
name: lux_booking_value_rate_expr
description: |
  Lux booking value defined as an expr with lux booking value, lux bookings, and total value as inputs.
  Tests constrained measure expr metric with external dimension join.
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: "average_booking_value * bookings / NULLIF(booking_value, 0)"
  metrics:
  - name: average_booking_value
    filter: "{{ Dimension('listing__is_lux_latest') }}"
  - name: bookings
    filter: "{{ Dimension('listing__is_lux_latest') }}"
  - name: booking_value

metrics.name: instant_booking_value_ratio
metrics.description:
Instant booking value defined as a ratio metric of instant booking value / booking value
Tests constrained measure ratio metric with re-use of the same base measure

file_slice.content:
name: instant_booking_value_ratio
description: |
  Instant booking value defined as a ratio metric of instant booking value / booking value
  Tests constrained measure ratio metric with re-use of the same base measure
type: ratio
type_params:
  numerator:
    name: booking_value
    filter: "{{ Dimension('booking__is_instant') }}"
    alias: booking_value_with_is_instant_constraint
  denominator:
    name: booking_value

metrics.name: instant_lux_booking_value_rate
metrics.description:
Instant booking value for lux bookings defined as a filtered metric on lux_booking_value_rate_expr
Tests constraint application for nested derived metrics.

file_slice.content:
name: instant_lux_booking_value_rate
description: |
  Instant booking value for lux bookings defined as a filtered metric on lux_booking_value_rate_expr
  Tests constraint application for nested derived metrics.
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: instant_lux_booking_value_rate
  metrics:
  - name: lux_booking_value_rate_expr
    filter: "{{ Dimension('booking__is_instant') }}"
    alias: instant_lux_booking_value_rate

metrics.name: regional_starting_balance_ratios
metrics.description:
First day account balance ratio of western vs eastern region starting balance ratios,
used to test interaction between semi-additive measures and measure constraints, and
behavior of predicate pushdown when there are multiple filters on the same categorical dimension

file_slice.content:
name: regional_starting_balance_ratios
description: |
  First day account balance ratio of western vs eastern region starting balance ratios,
  used to test interaction between semi-additive measures and measure constraints, and
  behavior of predicate pushdown when there are multiple filters on the same categorical dimension
type: ratio
type_params:
  numerator:
    name: total_account_balance_first_day
    filter: "{{ Dimension('user__home_state_latest') }} IN ('CA', 'HI', 'WA')"
    alias: west_coast_balance_first_day
  denominator:
    name: total_account_balance_first_day
    filter: "{{ Dimension('user__home_state_latest') }} IN ('MD', 'NY', 'TX')"
    alias: east_coast_balance_first_dat

metrics.name: double_counted_delayed_bookings
metrics.description: Minimal repro case for an expr with a single constrained and aliased measure as input.

file_slice.content:
name: double_counted_delayed_bookings
description: |
  Minimal repro case for an expr with a single constrained and aliased measure as input.
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: delayed_bookings * 2
  metrics:
  - name: bookings
    filter: "NOT {{ Dimension('booking__is_instant') }}"
    alias: delayed_bookings

metrics.name: referred_bookings
metrics.description: bookings made through a referral

type_params.expr: CASE WHEN referrer_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

file_slice.content:
name: "referred_bookings"
description: "bookings made through a referral"
type: simple
type_params:
  measure: referred_bookings

metrics.name: non_referred_bookings_pct
metrics.description: percentage of bookings that are not made through a referral

file_slice.content:
name: "non_referred_bookings_pct"
description: "percentage of bookings that are not made through a referral"
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: (bookings - ref_bookings) * 1.0 / bookings
  metrics:
  - name: referred_bookings
    alias: ref_bookings
  - name: bookings

metrics.name: booking_value_sub_instant
metrics.description: booking_value - instant_booking_value

file_slice.content:
name: "booking_value_sub_instant"
description: "booking_value - instant_booking_value"
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: booking_value - instant_booking_value
  metrics:
  - name: instant_booking_value
  - name: booking_value

metrics.name: booking_value_sub_instant_add_10
metrics.description: Add 10 to booking_value - instant_booking_value

file_slice.content:
name: "booking_value_sub_instant_add_10"
description: "Add 10 to booking_value - instant_booking_value"
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: booking_value_sub_instant + 10
  metrics:
  - name: booking_value_sub_instant

metrics.name: bookings_per_lux_listing_derived
metrics.description: Bookings divided by listings - using derived metric type

file_slice.content:
name: bookings_per_lux_listing_derived
description: Bookings divided by listings - using derived metric type
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: bookings * 1.0 / NULLIF(lux_listing, 0)
  metrics:
  - name: bookings
  - name: listings
    alias: lux_listing
    filter: "{{ Dimension('listing__is_lux_latest') }}"

metrics.name: instant_plus_non_referred_bookings_pct
metrics.description:
percentage of bookings that are not made through a referral + instant booking pct,
used to test nested derived metrics.

file_slice.content:
name: "instant_plus_non_referred_bookings_pct"
description: |
  percentage of bookings that are not made through a referral + instant booking pct,
  used to test nested derived metrics.
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: non_referred + (instant * 1.0 / bookings)
  metrics:
  - name: non_referred_bookings_pct
    alias: non_referred
  - name: instant_bookings
    alias: instant
  - name: bookings

metrics.name: trailing_2_months_revenue_sub_10
metrics.description: Test derived metric with a cumulative metric

file_slice.content:
name: "trailing_2_months_revenue_sub_10"
description: |
  Test derived metric with a cumulative metric
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: t2mr - 10
  metrics:
  - name: trailing_2_months_revenue
    alias: t2mr

metrics.name: booking_value_per_view
metrics.description: proportion of booking value per view, which allows us to test joins to listings with null values

file_slice.content:
name: booking_value_per_view
description: proportion of booking value per view, which allows us to test joins to
  listings with null values
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: booking_value / NULLIF(views, 0)
  metrics:
  - name: booking_value
  - name: views

metrics.name: bookings_growth_2_weeks
metrics.description:
percentage growth of bookings compared to bookings 2 weeks prior,
used to test derived metrics with an offset_window.

file_slice.content:
name: "bookings_growth_2_weeks"
description: |
  percentage growth of bookings compared to bookings 2 weeks prior,
  used to test derived metrics with an offset_window.
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: bookings - bookings_2_weeks_ago
  metrics:
  - name: bookings
  - name: bookings
    offset_window: 14 days
    alias: bookings_2_weeks_ago

metrics.description: bookings cumulative all time

file_slice.content:
name: bookings_all_time
description: bookings cumulative all time

  metrics:

count of bookings on a given day compared to the start of the month,

type: derived
type_params:
  expr: bookings - bookings_at_start_of_month
  metrics:

  - name: bookings

metrics.name: bookings_since_start_of_month
metrics.description: count of bookings since the start of the month, used to test derived metrics with an offset_to_grain.

name: bookings_since_start_of_month
description: |

type_params:

  metrics:

metrics.name: bookings_month_start_compared_to_1_month_prior
metrics.description:
percentage growth of bookings compared to bookings 2 weeks prior,
used to test derived metrics with an offset_window.

file_slice.content:
name: "bookings_month_start_compared_to_1_month_prior"
description: |
  percentage growth of bookings compared to bookings 2 weeks prior,
  used to test derived metrics with an offset_window.
type: derived
type_params:

  metrics:

  - name: bookings
    offset_window: 1 month
    alias: bookings_1_month_ago

filter: "{{ Entity('listing') }} IS NOT NULL"

metrics.name: bookings_join_to_time_spine_with_tiered_filters
metrics.description: simple metric that joins to timespine and has metric_time filters at both the measure and metric level

file_slice.content:
name: bookings_join_to_time_spine_with_tiered_filters
description: simple metric that joins to timespine and has metric_time filters at
  both the measure and metric level

type_params:
  measure:
    name: bookings
    join_to_timespine: true
    filter: "{{ TimeDimension('metric_time', 'day') }} >= '2020-01-02'"
filter: "{{ TimeDimension('metric_time', 'day') }} <= '2020-01-02'"

file_slice.content:
name: visit_buy_conversion_rate_7days_fill_nulls_with_0
description: conversion rate on visits-buys on a 7 day window, filling nulls with
  0 for both input measures
type: conversion
type_params:
  conversion_type_params:
    base_measure:
      name: visits
      fill_nulls_with: 0
      join_to_timespine: true
    conversion_measure:
      name: buys
      fill_nulls_with: 0
      join_to_timespine: true
    window: 7 days
    entity: user
    calculation: conversion_rate

metrics.name: active_listings
metrics.description: Listings with at least 2 bookings

file_slice.content:
name: active_listings
description: Listings with at least 2 bookings
type: simple
type_params:
  measure: listings
filter: "{{ Metric('bookings', ['listing']) }} > 2"

metrics.name: popular_listing_bookings_per_booker
metrics.description: bookings per booker for listings with at least 10 views

file_slice.content:
name: popular_listing_bookings_per_booker
description: bookings per booker for listings with at least 10 views
type: ratio
type_params:
  numerator:
    name: listings
  denominator:
    name: listings
filter: "{{ Metric('views', ['listing']) }} > 10"
time_granularity: week

metrics.name: derived_shared_alias_1a
metrics.description: Minimal repro case for derived metrics which give the same alias for different underlying metrics

  \ different underlying metrics"

  expr: shared_alias - 10

    alias: shared_alias

metrics.name: derived_shared_alias_1b
metrics.description: Minimal repro case for derived metrics which give the same alias for different underlying metrics

file_slice.content:
name: derived_shared_alias_1b
description: "Minimal repro case for derived metrics which give the same alias for\
  \ different underlying metrics"

metrics.name: derived_shared_alias_2
metrics.description: Minimal repro case for derived metrics which give the same alias for different underlying metrics

file_slice.content:

  \ different underlying metrics"

metrics.name: bookings_offset_one_alien_day
metrics.description: bookings offset by one alien_day

file_slice.content:
name: bookings_offset_one_alien_day
description: bookings offset by one alien_day
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: bookings
  metrics:
  - name: bookings
    offset_window: 1 alien_day

metrics.name: bookings_alien_day_over_alien_day
metrics.description: bookings growth martian day over martian day

file_slice.content:
name: bookings_alien_day_over_alien_day
description: bookings growth martian day over martian day
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: bookings - bookings_offset / NULLIF(bookings_offset, 0)
  metrics:
  - name: bookings
    offset_window: 1 alien_day
    alias: bookings_offset
  - name: bookings

type_params:

  cumulative_type_params:
    window: 7 days

  \ cumulative input"

metrics.name: test_simple_derived_metric
metrics.description: test simple derived metric

file_slice.content:
name: test_simple_derived_metric
description: "test simple derived metric"
type: derived
type_params:
  expr: alias_1 + alias_2 + alias_3 + alias_4
  metrics:
  - name: bookings
    alias: alias_1
  - name: referred_bookings
    alias: alias_2
  - name: instant_bookings
    alias: alias_3
  - name: booking_value
    alias: alias_4

  name: ds_month
  window_choice: min
create_metric: true

expr: "1"
agg: SUM
create_metric: true

name: archived_users

agg: SUM
create_metric: true

expr: 1
agg: count

name: buys
expr: 1
agg: count

expr: 1
agg: count

expr: 1
agg: count

agg: count_distinct

time_spine_table_configurations:
- location: demo.mf_time_spine
  column_name: ds
  grain: day
time_spines:
- node_relation:
    alias: mf_time_spine_nanosecond
    schema_name: demo
  primary_column:
    name: ts
    time_granularity: nanosecond
- node_relation:
    alias: mf_time_spine_microsecond
    schema_name: demo
  primary_column:
    name: ts
    time_granularity: microsecond
- node_relation:
    alias: mf_time_spine_millisecond
    schema_name: demo
  primary_column:
    name: ts
    time_granularity: millisecond
- node_relation:
    alias: mf_time_spine_second
    schema_name: demo
  primary_column:
    name: ts
    time_granularity: second
- node_relation:
    alias: mf_time_spine_minute
    schema_name: demo
  primary_column:
    name: ts
    time_granularity: minute
- node_relation:
    alias: mf_time_spine_hour
    schema_name: demo
  primary_column:
    name: ts
    time_granularity: hour
- node_relation:
    alias: mf_time_spine
    schema_name: demo
  primary_column:
    name: ds
    time_granularity: day
  custom_granularities:
  - name: alien_day

saved_queries.name: p0_booking
saved_queries.description: Booking-related metrics that are of the highest priority.

file_slice.content:
name: p0_booking
description: Booking-related metrics that are of the highest priority.
query_params:
  metrics:
  - bookings
  - instant_bookings
  group_by:
  - TimeDimension('metric_time', 'day')
  - Dimension('listing__capacity_latest')
  where:
  - "{{ Dimension('listing__capacity_latest') }} > 3"

saved_queries.name: p0_booking_with_order_by_and_limit
saved_queries.description: p0 bookings with order by and limit

file_slice.content:
name: p0_booking_with_order_by_and_limit
description: p0 bookings with order by and limit
query_params:
  metrics:
  - bookings
  - views
  group_by:
  - TimeDimension('metric_time', 'day')
  - Dimension('listing__capacity_latest')
  order_by:
  - TimeDimension('metric_time', 'day').descending(True)
  - Dimension('listing__capacity_latest')
  - Metric('bookings').descending(True)
  - Metric('views')
  limit: 10

saved_queries.name: saved_query_with_cumulative_metric
saved_queries.description:
Saved query that includes a cumulative metric. Added as cumulative metrics have a branch in the CLI for
adjusting the time constraint.

file_slice.content:
name: saved_query_with_cumulative_metric
description: |
  Saved query that includes a cumulative metric. Added as cumulative metrics have a branch in the CLI for
  adjusting the time constraint.
query_params:
  metrics:
  - trailing_2_months_revenue
  group_by:
  - TimeDimension('metric_time', 'day')

saved_queries.name: saved_query_with_metric_joins_and_filter
saved_queries.description:
Saved query that includes multiple metrics from different input sources requiring a metric join and
a query-level filter on a mix of categorical and time dimension filters.
Note this will not run on Trino due to the invalid filter construction - Trino will not cast string literals
to timestamp types the way other engines do.

file_slice.content:
name: saved_query_with_metric_joins_and_filter
description: |
  Saved query that includes multiple metrics from different input sources requiring a metric join and
  a query-level filter on a mix of categorical and time dimension filters.
  Note this will not run on Trino due to the invalid filter construction - Trino will not cast string literals
  to timestamp types the way other engines do.
query_params:
  metrics:
  - bookings
  - views
  - bookings_per_view
  group_by:
  - Dimension('listing__capacity_latest')
  where:
  - "{{ Dimension('listing__is_lux_latest') }}"
  - "{{ TimeDimension('metric_time', 'day') }} >= '2020-01-02'"

name: dimensions_only
description: Query without metrics
query_params:
  group_by:
  - Dimension('listing__capacity_latest')
  - TimeDimension('metric_time', 'month')
  metrics: []
